title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 49.190 - Notice for special term
text:
49.190.  Notice for special term. — Notice of such special term shall be given to the commissioners who were absent when the same was ordered, and by advertisement placed up in five public places in the county at least five days before the commencement of such term.
(RSMo 1939 § 2488, A.L. 1983 S.B. 219) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2086; 1919 § 2582; 1909 § 4089 
Effective 1-01-85
